input:
Extract the contract metadata from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: effective_date (ISO 8601), parties (array of strings), governing_law (string).

Text: "This Master Services Agreement is made effective as of 1 March 2026 between Acme Ltd and Globex Inc, and is governed by the laws of England and Wales."

Extract the lease metadata from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: term_start (ISO 8601 date), term_months (integer), monthly_rent_gbp (number).

Text: "The initial term commences on 2026-06-01 and runs for twelve (12) calendar months. Monthly rent is £2,400."

Extract the NDA metadata from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: effective_date (ISO 8601), term_years (integer), mutual (boolean).

Text: "This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement is effective 2026-04-15 and shall remain in force for three (3) years."

Extract the case citation from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: case_name (string), year (integer), court (string), citation (string).

Text: "Donoghue v Stevenson [1932] AC 562 was decided by the House of Lords."

Extract the statute reference from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: title (string), section (string), jurisdiction (string).

Text: "Section 230 of the Communications Decency Act, 47 U.S.C. § 230, governs interactive computer services."

Extract the SOW metadata from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: sow_number (string), kickoff_date (ISO 8601), duration_weeks (integer), fee_gbp (number).

Text: "Statement of Work SOW-0042 will commence 2026-07-15 for a duration of eight weeks at a fee of £40,000."

Extract the litigation hold metadata and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: matter_id (string), notice_date (ISO 8601), custodians (array of strings).

Text: "Litigation Hold MAT-2026-118 was issued on 2026-02-09 to custodians: A. Patel, B. Cohen, C. Nakamura."

Extract the privilege-log row metadata and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: doc_id (string), date (ISO 8601), basis (string).

Text: "Document DOC-9481, dated 2026-01-22, withheld on the basis of attorney-client privilege."

Extract the regulatory filing metadata and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: regulator (string), filing_id (string), filed_on (ISO 8601), category (string).

Text: "Filed with the FCA under reference FCA-2026-0731 on 2026-03-04 in category 'Annual Returns'."

Extract the invoice metadata from the following text and respond with ONLY a JSON object with keys: invoice_number (string), invoice_date (ISO 8601), amount_gbp (number), client (string).

Text: "Invoice INV-2026-0410 dated 2026-04-10 for £12,500 to Acme Ltd."
